_comment: RAT deployment-runtime/v1 conformance vectors — ADR-003 shared golden data for the two divergent references (local-process-py: real subprocess; k8s-dryrun-py: maps the profile to a Pod securityContext). Tests the Launch→Healthcheck→Terminate lifecycle AND the load-bearing I9 obligation: a conformant deployment-runtime MUST honor the IsolationProfile (deployment_runtime.proto SECURITY) — it refuses to launch a plugin whose isolation is below the I9 minimum (run_as_non_root + drop_all_capabilities + no_new_privileges). A runtime that ignores the profile fails conformance. The running Healthcheck's detail carries an isolation-honored receipt (a conformance stand-in, like storage's scope receipt) so the property is observable.
